positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a crescent moon nestled in a bed of glowing bioluminescent stars and celestial flora. The central composition features a stylized, gentle astronaut floating among the constellations, enveloped by swirling nebula dust and vibrant, phosphorescent smoke. Use a deep indigo, cosmic purple, and luminous teal color palette. The overall style should be clean line art mixed with digital watercolor textures, highly contrasting, resembling modern tattoo flash or vintage celestial posters. Vector quality, symmetrical, high detail, flat graphic design elements integrated with organic flow. Perfect for screen printing on clothing.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, artifact, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, noisy, photographic, realistic, photorealistic, jpeg artifacts
